name: Claude Series (Claude 1 through Claude 4)
training_approach: Pretraining + Constitutional AI (RLHF with AI-generated feedback based on a set of principles)
key_innovations: Constitutional AI — training with a set of principles rather than purely human feedback
Extended context windows (100K+ tokens from Claude 2 onward)
Emphasis on being helpful, harmless, and honest (HHH framework)
lineage_path: Transformer → GPT-style pretraining → RLHF → Constitutional AI → Claude 1 → Claude 2 → Claude 3 → Claude 3.5 → Claude 4
cultural_impact: The Claude series represents the most prominent safety-focused approach to frontier AI development. Anthropic's Constitutional AI methodology — where the model is trained against a set of principles rather than relying solely on human raters — introduced a novel alignment paradigm. Claude has become one of the most widely used AI assistants for professional and technical work, particularly valued for nuanced reasoning and long-context capabilities.
